The finest roast in the city.
Experience the clarity.

Story.title:
More Than Just
A Morning Routine.
Story.p1: Founded in 2024, Brew & Glass began with a simple mission: to bring transparency to the coffee industry. We believe every cup tells a story, from the soil in Ethiopia to the pour in your cup.
Story.p2: We partner directly with farmers, ensuring they are paid above fair-trade prices. Our roasting process is data-driven, but our service is human-first.

items.name: Dark Matter
items.desc: Single origin espresso with notes of dark chocolate.

items.name: Cold Brew
items.desc: Steeped for 24 hours. Smooth, silky, and intense.

items.name: Butter Crust
items.desc: Imported flour, local butter. Flaky perfection.

step_1.title:
Ethical
Farming
step_1.desc: We travel to the mountains of Ethiopia and Colombia to meet the farmers. Every bean is hand-picked and fair-trade certified.

step_2.title:
Precision
Heat
step_2.desc: Roasted in small batches in our downtown facility. We bring out the natural fruit and chocolate notes hidden inside every bean.

step_3.title:
Liquid
Gold
step_3.desc: Served at the perfect temperature. Whether you like a V60 pour-over or a rich espresso, we craft it with obsession.

CoffeeTemplate3.Marquee: • SINGLE ORIGIN • DIRECT TRADE • MICRO ROAST •

1.name: Obsidian Espresso
1.desc: Double shot of single-origin darkness. Notes of molasses and smoke.

2.name: Flat White Noise
2.desc: Micro-foam velvet poured over ristretto. Smooth, silence in a cup.

3.name: Noir Mocha
3.desc: A decadent, comforting blend. The richness of dark chocolate masks the harshness of the espresso.

4.name: Cold Brew Void
4.desc: Steeped for 24 hours in total darkness. High caffeine, low acidity.

5.name: Midnight Matcha
5.desc: Ceremonial grade Uji matcha whisked into charcoal-infused oat milk.

6.name: Charcoal Latte
6.desc: Activated charcoal and vanilla bean. A detox for the modern soul.

7.name: Golden Tonic
7.desc: Turmeric, ginger, and sparkling water. Sharp and awakening.

8.name: Shadow Bramble
8.desc: A sophisticated, slightly savory mocktail. The herbal notes of sage cut through the sweet berry profile.

9.name: Eclipse Croissant
9.desc: Crispy on the outside, impossibly airy and buttery on the inside.

10.name: Basque Burnt Cake
10.desc: Intentionally scorched on top to create a slightly bitter caramel note.

11.name: Shadow Toast
11.desc: Thick slice of sourdough toast topped with smashed avocado.

12.name: Noir Brownie
12.desc: Extremely dense and fudgy, not cakey. The flaky sea salt cuts through.

13.name: Classic Macchiato
13.desc: For purists who want the punch of an espresso but need just a touch of milk to soften the bite.

14.name: V60 Slow Drip
14.desc: A manual, pour-over method that creates a clean, tea-like body. Highlights the bright, fruity notes of the bean.

15.name: Spiced Chai Fog
15.desc: A warming, aromatic blend of Indian spices. Sweet, spicy, and deeply comforting.

16.name: Crimson Cooler
16.desc: Vibrant, floral, and iced. The tartness of the hibiscus is perfectly balanced by the sweetness of muddled summer berries.

17.name: Almond Crescent
17.desc: Sweeter and denser than a traditional croissant. The almond paste inside stays soft and warm.

18.name: Blueberry Streusel
18.desc: A soft, cake-like muffin bursting with tart berries. The crunchy cinnamon sugar top adds texture.

19.name: Everything Bagel
19.desc: Dense, chewy, and loaded with savory garlic and onion flavors. A reliable breakfast staple.

20.name: Vegan Cinnamon Roll
20.desc: Gooey, warm, and highly spiced. You won't believe it has absolutely no dairy.

21.name: Midnight Fudge Cake
21.desc: The ultimate indulgence. Three tall layers of rich, moist chocolate cake glued together by thick buttercream.

22.name: Spiced Carrot Cake
22.desc: A textured, slightly savory cake featuring warm baking spices and an incredibly rich, tangy cream cheese frosting.

23.name: Classic Tiramisu
23.desc: An elegant, airy Italian dessert. The strong coffee flavor is softened by the lightly sweetened mascarpone cheese.

24.name: Zesty Lemon Loaf
24.desc: Bright, sour, and palate-cleansing. The cake is dense and buttery, perfectly contrasting the sharp, sugary glaze.

faq.label: ВОПРОСЫ
faq.heading: Вопросы и ответы.
faq.a1: VOLOO — платформа цифровых меню для кафе и ресторанов Тбилиси. Коснитесь NFC-тега на столе или отсканируйте QR-код — живое меню заведения откроется прямо в браузере, без установки приложения. AI-консьерж читает то же меню: спрашивайте об ингредиентах, аллергенах или о том, что подходит вашей диете — на русском, грузинском или английском.
faq.a2: Сюрприз-пакет — это хорошая непроданная еда, которую местные кафе и рестораны собирают в конце дня и продают со скидкой до 50% — еда, которая иначе пропала бы. Забронируйте пакет на VOLOO, оплатите онлайн и заберите в заведении до закрытия.
faq.a3: Картой, онлайн. Платежи безопасно обрабатывает Flitt — платёжная платформа банка TBC. VOLOO не хранит данные вашей карты.
faq.a4: VOLOO работает в Тбилиси, и список заведений постоянно растёт. Новые кафе и рестораны добавляются регулярно — все текущие площадки видны в каталоге выше.
faq.a5: Пока VOLOO работает по приглашениям — мы подключаем Тбилиси заведение за заведением. Оставьте почту в форме выше или напишите на hello@shemoqmedi.space — мы соберём цифровое меню и привезём NFC-теги.
faq.a6: Да — на запуске подключение к VOLOO бесплатно для заведений: цифровое меню, NFC-теги на столы, AI-консьерж и место в маркетплейсе сюрприз-пакетов.
